title: DocGuard project config (.docguard.json)
description: Schema for the .docguard.json file that DocGuard reads at the root of every project. Add `"$schema": "https://raccioly.github.io/docguard/schemas/docguard-config.schema.json"` to your file to get autocomplete + validation in VS Code and other JSON-Schema-aware editors.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete. Not consumed by DocGuard itself.

version.description: Schema version (0.1, 0.2, ... 0.5). Bumped when fields are added or behavior changes. Migrate with `docguard upgrade --apply`.

projectName.description: Human-friendly project name used in guard output.

profile.description: Compliance profile. starter = minimal, standard = full CDD, enterprise = adds advanced validators.

projectType.description: Project shape. Affects which validators run (e.g. webapp + api need env vars; cli/library can skip).

projectTypeConfig.description: Per-type behavior knobs that override profile defaults.

sourceRoot.description: Subdirectory containing the project's source files (e.g. `backend/src`). Validators scope to this when set.

ignore.description: Glob patterns for paths every validator should skip. Merged with `.docguardignore` at runtime.

securityIgnore.description: Glob patterns the Security validator additionally skips (e.g. test fixtures with intentional secrets).

todoIgnore.description: Glob patterns the TODO-Tracking validator additionally skips.

requiredFiles.description: Files DocGuard expects to exist. Missing files become Structure validator errors.

agentFile.description: Agent rule file(s) (e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md). Array means any one suffices.

validators.description: Enable / disable individual validators. Set to false to skip.

severity.description: Per-validator severity overrides. Affects EXIT CODE only — display is unchanged. high = warnings fail CI (exit 1). low = warnings ignored. medium (default) = exit 2.

draftStalenessDays.description: How many days a `status: draft` doc may sit unmodified before Generated-Staleness warns. Default 14.

testPattern.description: Single glob identifying test files (legacy single-string form).

testPatterns.description: Glob patterns identifying test files. Preferred over testPattern.

includeTestFiles.description: If true, scan test files for TODO/FIXME annotations. Off by default to avoid false positives from comment-marker strings inside test fixtures.

deepScan.description: If true and the `understanding` CLI is on PATH, run its 31-metric deep analysis. Off by default.
